session.user:
Search the codebase for tests that set up FakePromptExecutor with simulated_prompt_output for the purpose of testing PR description generation (commit message generation). Look in tests/commands/pr/ and tests/unit/cli/commands/ directories. Report all files and the test function names.
Use these search patterns: 1. `Grep(pattern="simulated_prompt_output", path="/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests", glob="*.py", output_mode="content", -n=true)` 2. `Grep(pattern="CommitMessageGenerator|commit_message|pr_rewrite|pr.*submit", path="/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/", glob="*.py", output_mode="files_with_matches")` 3. `Grep(pattern="simulated_prompt_output", path="/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit", glob="*.py", output_mode="content", -n=true)` if the directory exists
Report all files that set up FakePromptExecutor with prompt output that looks like PR description content (title + body format).
